V-M-024.checks: Admin endpoints can list devices, view anomaly and recent anti-abuse context, and block or unblock or revoke a specific device peer while preserving user-level auth boundaries.
V-M-024.commands: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=dpFmfSVqfdAK3yx5MQV6Tcv35RZuw5MzaH0yhxJ01q0= PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_admin_device_control.py -v

phase-24-contract-guard.guard-1: Frontend device actions must keep one-device targeting for block, unblock, rotate, and revoke.
phase-24-contract-guard.guard-2: UI confirmation text must identify the target device/user before mutation and must not imply whole-account disablement.
phase-24-contract-guard.guard-3: If backend device-control files or frontend endpoint bindings change during Phase-24, rerun this verification before marking V-M-037 pass-local.

levels.module-local: Run backend device admin tests if M-024 files or frontend-admin device API bindings change.
levels.wave-level: During Phase-24 UI waves, static review confirms action buttons call confirmation logic before existing M-024 endpoint bindings.
levels.phase-level: Final Phase-24 evidence records confirmation-safe UI plus either no backend/device-control diff or a passing V-M-024 rerun.

scenarios.scenario: Admin blocks specific device peer without affecting other devices
Admin device payload exposes recent anti-abuse event context for operator triage
Enforcement bypasses auth or disables whole user account instead of targeted device
Frontend row controls execute block, unblock, rotate, or revoke without an explicit confirmation surface

observability.telemetry-1: Device-control evidence records device id surrogate, action name, confirmation state, result status, and refreshed list behavior.
observability.telemetry-2: Evidence must not contain peer private keys, full VPN configs, bearer tokens, or raw endpoint IPs when screenshots/text logs are saved.

phase-24-evidence.evidence-1: 2026-05-10: Phase-24 did not modify backend/app/admin/router.py or M-024 backend enforcement logic.
phase-24-evidence.evidence-2: 2026-05-10: Device UI action smoke confirmed a one-device confirmation surface before mutation and observed no mutation request before confirm.
